sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports feeling weak. The patient reports tenderness. The patient reports no tenderness. The patient reports a dime-size abrasion. The patient reports abrasions. The patient reports clicking. The patient denies crepitus.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: Symptoms are most consistent with orthostatic dizziness.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor will examine the patient's knee. The patient will follow up with physical therapy in 4-6 weeks.
